title: subagent.dispatch.v1
description: Cross-harness sub-agent dispatch envelope used by Agent Skills (Claude Code, Codex CLI, etc).

request_id.description: Unique, deterministic id; host returns its result keyed on this id.

role.description: Semantic role of the spawned worker. Harness shim maps to its native sub-agent type.

prompt.description: Literal prompt the sub-agent receives. Skill ships it ready to dispatch.

inputs.description: Kind-specific structured inputs. Empty object is legal.

model.description: Explicit model override. Host harness prefers this when set; otherwise maps effort to its lineup.

response_schema.description: Free-form shape hint describing the JSON the sub-agent must return; per-skill validation is host-defined and NOT a strict JSON Schema.

tools.description: Allowed tool names for the spawned sub-agent. Empty/omitted means host default.

timeout_ms.description: Soft cap. Host may shorten to its ceiling.

parent_run_id.description: Links this dispatch to the parent FSM run for tracing.

outputs_path.description: Absolute path where the sub-agent's JSON response must be written.
